basic_details.job_title: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Tech Lead, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Tech Lead, Full Stack Developer, Project Manager
basic_details.short_information: National e-Governance Division (NeGD) Recruitment 2026: National e-Governance Division has released the official notification for 3 Tech Lead, Full Stack Developer, Project Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree (B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc) in Computer Science/ Information Technology, or related fields; Master’s degree M.E./M. Tech/ M.Sc in Computer Science, Software Engineering or IT.
qualification.details: Tech Lead: Bachelor’s Degree (B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc) in Computer Science/ Information Technology, or related fields. Desirable: Master’s degree M.E./M. Tech/ M.Sc in Computer Science, Software Engineering or IT. Full Stack Developer: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field. Project Manager: Bachelor’s Degree (B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc) in Computer Science/ Information Technology, or related fields.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the NeGD Recruitment 2026 is 14th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Tech Lead, Full Stack Developer, and Project Manager in the National e-Governance Division Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary per post, generally requiring a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related fields. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the NeGD vacancies?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under NeGD Recruitment 2026 is 55 years. No specific minimum age limit is mentioned.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NeGD Recruitment 2026. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the NeGD Recruitment 2026 is primarily based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview based on their application and qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of employment for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised under NeGD Recruitment 2026 are on a Contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for NeGD Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific residency requirements or eligibility criteria for non-Delhi candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What are the official websites for NeGD?
faq.answer: The official websites for the National e-Governance Division (NeGD) are www.negd.gov.in and www.dic.gov.in. These sites provide further information and updates.
